productDisplayName: Puma Men Jamaica Fun White T-shirt
description: Composition White T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, fabric tape detailing on the in-seam, stitch detailing and branding in yellow, green and blue printed on the front Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron on reverse This fabulous puma T-shirt has an exclusive casual style and a great look. The branding on the tee ups your style quotient, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or tracks and canvas shoes to look your best. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
